title: Europe's deadly heatwave breaks German record and halts public events
summary_full: Germany's highest ever temperature of 41.3C is recorded provisionally in Saarbrücken, over the border from France.
summary_public: Germany's highest ever temperature of 41.3C is recorded provisionally in Saarbrücken, over the border from France.
